title: If you receive a CPP/EI ruling - Canada.ca
content:
## If you receive a CPP/EI ruling
If you received a Canada Pension Plan and employment insurance (CPP/EI) ruling, it is because a ruling was requested by:
- Service Canada, for the administration of the EI program
- The Canada Revenue Agency (CRA), for the administration of some of its programs
A CPP/EI ruling is an official decision made by an authorized officer of the CRA. The ruling confirms whether a worker is an employee or is self-employed, and whether the worker's employment is pensionable, insurable, or both.
Learn more about possible implications of a ruling and what to do if you disagree: After a ruling has been made

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
